data.title: F2Pool co-founder Wang Chun speaks out on the BIP-110 controversy, criticizing Bitcoin extremism for hindering innovation.
data.description: F2Pool co-founder Wang Chun posted on the X platform regarding the controversy surrounding BIP-110, stating that Bitcoin should not be sanctified and criticizing some Bitcoin extremists for hindering technological innovation. He pointed out that some supporters regard any attempt at scaling or feature improvement as "altcoin attacks," using moral accusations to cover up a lack of innovation, thus transforming Bitcoin from an economic concept into an ideologically driven system. Wang Chun stated that against the backdrop of the continued development of DeFi, privacy, and payment infrastructure, Bitcoin should not become a system "too rigid to evolve."

data.title: A whale used 7x leverage to go long on approximately $21 million worth of Brent crude oil.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale, after a period of inactivity of approximately two months, added $4.1 million USDC to its long position in Brent crude oil within the past 16 hours. This position is currently a 7x leveraged long position, comprising approximately 203,434 Brent crude oil contracts, with a position value of approximately $21 million. The opening price was approximately $106.91, and the liquidation price was approximately $89.05.

data.title: Ninth Circuit Court Denies Kalshi's Emergency Stay Request Amid Nevada Dispute
data.description: The Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals has rejected Kalshi's emergency stay request, allowing Nevada regulators to seek a temporary restraining order that may prohibit the platform's operations in the state for a minimum of 14 days. According to NS3.AI, Nevada contends that Kalshi's sports event contracts constitute unlicensed sports betting under state law. In contrast, Kalshi argues that these contracts are under the jurisdiction of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). This legal conflict highlights the increasing scrutiny of prediction markets, where weekly trading volumes have consistently surpassed $2 billion.

data.title: Investment Strategies for 10 Lakh Rupees Suggested by Experts
data.description:
Experts have provided insights on where to invest 10 lakh rupees in the current market. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting various investment avenues that could yield favorable returns.

According to financial analysts, diversifying investments across different asset classes is crucial. They recommend allocating funds into a mix of equities, fixed deposits, and mutual funds to balance risk and reward. Equities are suggested for those willing to take on higher risk for potentially greater returns, while fixed deposits offer more stability.

Mutual funds are highlighted as a viable option for investors seeking professional management of their portfolios. Experts also emphasize the importance of considering one's risk tolerance and financial goals when making investment decisions.

Overall, the advice underscores the need for a strategic approach to investing, taking into account market conditions and individual financial objectives.

data.title: Croatia Withdraws Troops from Iraq Following U.S. and Israeli Strikes on Iran
data.description: Croatia has withdrawn all seven of its soldiers participating in NATO missions in Iraq, according to an announcement from the Croatian President's office on March 19. According to Jin10, this decision follows recent military actions by the United States and Israel against Iran. Croatian President Zoran Milanović decided to pull out the troops from the Middle East, where they were involved in NATO and United Nations missions, with seven stationed in Iraq and one in Lebanon. President Milanović criticized the U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran, stating that military interventions without United Nations authorization do not help resolve crises but instead exacerbate conflicts and lead to long-term instability.

data.title: The Mantle lending market reached a record high of $1.35 billion.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Mantle's (@Mantle_Official) lending market size has reached $1.35 billion, a record high.

data.title: Slovenia Faces Tense Election Amid Allegations of Foreign Interference
data.description: Slovenia is preparing for a closely contested election on Sunday, with leading candidates exchanging accusations related to a scandal involving alleged foreign interference in the campaign. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the heightened tensions as political parties vie for power in the small European nation. The allegations have intensified the electoral atmosphere, with each side attempting to leverage the situation to their advantage. As voters head to the polls, the outcome remains uncertain, with the potential for significant political shifts depending on the election results. The controversy has drawn attention to the influence of external factors in domestic politics, raising concerns about the integrity of the electoral process.

data.title: JPMorgan Anticipates Second Rate Hike Following Similar Path
data.description: JPMorgan is expected to follow a similar path for its second interest rate hike. According to ChainCatcher, the financial institution plans to release new forecasts in June, which will be confirmed before implementing the rate increase in July.

data.title: Historic Fugger Family Bank May Be Up for Sale
data.description: The Fugger family, known for its significant influence in European banking history, may soon see a private bank founded by one of its descendants put on the market. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the potential sale of this historic financial institution. The Fugger family was renowned for establishing trading routes and providing loans to Holy Roman Emperors and popes, marking a significant era in European banking. The possible sale of the bank could mark the end of an era for the Fugger legacy in the financial world.

data.title: LumiWave to Launch Independent Mainnet Following DAO Approval
data.description: LumiWave has announced the launch of its official independent mainnet on April 1, following a successful DAO governance vote that approved the transition from Sui. According to NS3.AI, the project aims to broaden its scope beyond a single-game-focused mechanism to include multiple intellectual properties, AI content, and real-world asset tokenization.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold and Silver Prices Fluctuate Amid U.S. Dollar Index Volatility
data.description: Gold and silver prices have experienced significant fluctuations this week due to the volatility of the U.S. Dollar Index. According to Ming Pao, the technical analysis indicates that both metals continue to move within a large range. Investors are advised to maintain a strategy of selling high and buying low within this range. For more detailed technical analysis and investment strategies, viewers are encouraged to watch the related video content.

data.title: The Importance of Saying No in U.S. Alliances
data.description:
The dynamics of international alliances often hinge on the ability to say no, according to a recent opinion piece. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that a valuable ally to the United States is not always one that agrees with every decision or policy. Instead, the strength of an alliance can be measured by the ability to provide honest feedback and constructive criticism.

This perspective suggests that allies who can voice dissenting opinions contribute to more robust and resilient partnerships. Such relationships allow for a broader range of perspectives, ultimately leading to more informed and effective decision-making.

The article emphasizes that the ability to say no is not a sign of weakness or disloyalty but rather an indication of a mature and balanced alliance. It argues that this approach can lead to stronger, more sustainable partnerships that are better equipped to handle global challenges.

data.title: India Explores Real-Time Euro Settlements at Financial Hub
data.description: India is contemplating the implementation of real-time foreign-exchange settlements in euros at its exclusive international financial hub, according to sources. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move aims to strengthen financial connections as the EU-India trade agreement advances. The initiative is seen as a strategic effort to enhance economic collaboration between India and the European Union, reflecting the growing importance of the euro in international trade and finance. This development comes amid ongoing negotiations for a comprehensive trade deal between the two regions, which could further bolster economic ties.

data.title: Web3 API platform Uniblock has raised $5.2 million in funding, bringing its total funding to $7.5 million.
data.description: According to official news, Web3 API platform Uniblock has completed a $5.2 million funding round, bringing its total funding to $7.5 million. Investors include SBI, AllianceDAO, BFF, and NGC. Previously, in November 2023, Uniblock announced a $2.3 million funding round, with participants including Cadenza, Blockchain Founders Fund, Side Door Ventures, AQN, Serafund, and Outsider Ventures.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $90.1896 million yesterday, with BlackRock's IBIT experiencing the largest net outflow at $38.2512 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $90.1896 million yesterday (March 19th, Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF (BTC), with a net inflow of $4.6627 million, bringing BTC's historical total net inflow to $2.186 billion. This was followed by the Franklin Bitcoin ETF (EZBC), with a net inflow of $4.0642 million, bringing EZBC's historical total net inflow to $375 million. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the BlackRock ETF (IBIT), with a net outflow of $38.2512 million, bringing IBIT's historical total net inflow to $63.303 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $90.828 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.44%, and a cumulative net inflow of $56.283 billion.

data.title: UK Rail Network Nationalization: Prospects for Cheaper Fares and Improved Service
data.description:
The United Kingdom is set to nationalize its rail network, a move that has sparked discussions about the potential for reduced fares and enhanced service quality. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the government's commitment to revamping the rail system to better serve the public.

The nationalization effort aims to address longstanding issues within the rail industry, including high ticket prices and inconsistent service. By bringing the rail network under government control, officials hope to streamline operations and improve efficiency.

Critics, however, remain skeptical about the government's ability to deliver on these promises. Concerns have been raised about the financial implications of nationalization and whether it will lead to tangible benefits for passengers.

The transition to a nationalized rail system is expected to take time, with the government outlining a phased approach to implementation. As the process unfolds, stakeholders will be closely monitoring the impact on both the rail industry and the traveling public.

The success of this initiative will largely depend on the government's ability to manage the complexities of the rail network and address the challenges that have plagued the industry for years. The outcome will be crucial in determining whether nationalization can indeed fulfill its promise of cheaper fares and better service for UK rail passengers.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Nvidia to Provide Amazon Web Services with 1 Million GPUs by 2027
data.description: Nvidia is set to supply Amazon Web Services (AWS) with approximately 1 million GPUs by the end of 2027, as AWS enhances its AI infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, AWS announced that the deployment will commence this year across its global cloud regions. The collaboration will also involve extensive work with Nvidia on networking and related systems to support agentic AI workloads.

data.title: AI's Potential to Transform Filmmaking Industry
data.description: AI is poised to revolutionize the filmmaking industry, offering opportunities similar to those provided by YouTube for content creators with limited budgets. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting how artificial intelligence could democratize film production, enabling a broader range of creators to produce high-quality content. This technological advancement may lead to a significant shift in how films are made and distributed, potentially lowering barriers to entry and fostering innovation in storytelling. As AI continues to evolve, its impact on the creative process and the film industry as a whole could be profound, reshaping traditional methods and opening new avenues for artistic expression.

data.title: A new wallet bets $44,000. Iran still controls Kharg Island this month.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, a newly created three-day wallet bet $44,000 that Iran still controls Kharg Island this month, with a current market probability of 91.5%. Kharg Island is a key oil export hub in the northern Persian Gulf, handling over 90% of Iran's crude oil exports, and possesses irreplaceable strategic value to the Iranian economy and the global energy supply chain. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the forecast market, anticipating changes before pricing them in.
